2606.23104.title: ReNIO: Reweighting Negative Trajectory Importance for LLM On-Policy Distillation
2606.23104.paper_summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) improves LLM reasoning by training a student model on its own generated outputs, but standard OPD treats all student-generated outputs (SGOs) equally regardless of their informativeness. We observe a consistent asymmetry in controlled filtering experiments: in both OPD and on-policy self distillation (OPSD), training only on incorrect SGOs outperforms training only on correct ones. Our further analysis suggests that models trained on correct-only SGOs tend to generate shorter reasoning traces and show weaker reflection behavior, while incorrect SGOs better preserve exploratory reasoning near the model's capability boundary. To exploit this signal without requiring full answer-containing rollouts, we introduce ReNIO, which Reweights Negative trajectory Importance for LLM On-policy distillation. By using the student-to-teacher probability ratio, ReNIO identifies pivotal tokens leading to wrong reasoning traces and aggregates their information into a normalized sample weight, inherently assigning larger weights to likely negative trajectories without observing the correctness of final-answer. Since Re-NIO only uses prefix-conditioned token probabilities, it preserves OPD's prefix training advantage over full-rollout reinforcement learning. Across both mathematical reasoning and code generation tasks, ReNIO improves both OPD and OPSD, with representative relative gains of up to 8.90% for Qwen3-1.7B and 10.00% for R1-Distill-Qwen-7B on mathematical reasoning benchmarks. Code repo: https://github.com/BDML-lab/ReNIO.
2606.23104.paper_summary_zh: 在政策內的蒸餾（OPD）透過在其自身生成的輸出上訓練學生模型來改善大型語言模型（LLM）的推理，但標準的 OPD 對所有學生生成的輸出（SGO）不加區別地對待，無論其信息量如何。我們在控制過濾實驗中觀察到了一致的不對稱性：在 OPD 和政策內自我蒸餾（OPSD）中，僅在錯誤的 SGO 上訓練的效果優於僅在正確的 SGO 上訓練的效果。我們的進一步分析表明，僅在正確的 SGO 上訓練的模型往往生成較短的推理痕跡，並顯示出較弱的反思行為，而錯誤的 SGO 更好地保留了接近模型能力邊界的探索性推理。為了利用這一信號而不需要完整答案的展開，我們引入了 ReNIO，即對 LLM 政策內蒸餾的負向軌跡重要性重新加權。通過使用學生與教師的概率比，ReNIO 確定導致錯誤推理痕跡的關鍵標記，並將其信息聚合到一個標準化的樣本權重中，自然地對可能的負向軌跡分配更大的權重，而不考慮最終答案的正確性。由於 Re-NIO 僅使用前綴條件的標記概率，它保留了 OPD 在完整展開強化學習中的前綴訓練優勢。在數學推理和代碼生成任務中，ReNIO 改善了 OPD 和 OPSD，對於 Qwen3-1.7B 在數學推理基準上代表性的相對增益高達 8.90%，對於 R1-Distill-Qwen-7B 則高達 10.00%。代碼庫：https://github.com/BDML-lab/ReNIO。
2606.23104.author: Chen Lin et.al.
2606.23104.authors: Chen Lin, Kedi Chen, Wei Zhang
